text:
(5) There shall not be included in the minutes, any matter which, in the opinion of the Chairman of the
meeting,—
(a) is or could reasonably be regarded as defamatory of any person; or
(b) is irrelevant or immaterial to the proceedings; or
(c) is detrimental to the interests of the company.
sentence_window:
22-1-2021). 79

--- PAGE 80 ---
(a) the names of the directors present at the meeting; and
(b) in the case of each resolution passed at the meeting, the names of the directors,
if any, dissenting from, or not concurring with the resolution. (5) There shall not be included in the minutes, any matter which, in the opinion of the Chairman of the
meeting,—
(a) is or could reasonably be regarded as defamatory of any person; or
(b) is irrelevant or immaterial to the proceedings; or
(c) is detrimental to the interests of the company. (6) The Chairman shall exercise absolute discretion in regard to the inclusion or non-inclusion of any
matter in the minutes on the grounds specified in sub-section (5). (7) The minutes kept in accordance with the provisions of this section shall be evidence of the
proceedings recorded therein.
